lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਦਰਿ ਢੋਈ ਨਾ ਲਹਹਿ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: manamukh dar dtoee naa laheh bhaae doojai karam kamaae |4|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs find no place in the Court of the Lord; they do their deeds in the love of duality. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਜਾਗ੍ਰਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਪਵਈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vich jaagran na hovee har bhagat na pavee thaae |
lines.english: In egotism, one cannot remain awake and aware, and one's devotional worship of the Lord is not accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਪੈਨੑਣਾ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig khaanaa dhrig painanaa jinaa doojai bhaae piaar |
lines.english: Cursed is the food, and cursed are the clothes, of those who are attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀੜੇ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਹੋਹਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bisattaa ke keerre bisattaa raate mar jameh hohi khuaar |5|
lines.english: They are like maggots in manure, sinking into manure. In death and rebirth, they are wasted away to ruin. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹਾਂ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tin kee sangat mil rahaan sache sach samaau |6|
lines.english: I shall continue to associate with them; devoted to Truth, I am absorbed in Truth. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau satigur bhettiaa tinaa vittahu bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meet with the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਉਪਾਇ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag gur paaeeai upaae kitai na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: By perfect destiny, the Guru is found. He cannot be found by any efforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur te sehaj aoopajai haumai sabad jalaae |7|
lines.english: Through the True Guru, intuitive wisdom wells up; through the Word of the Shabad, egotism is burnt away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਗੁ ॥੮॥੨॥੭॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai jo kichh karai su hog |8|2|7|2|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, never forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord. Whatever He does, comes to pass. ||8||2||7||2||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har saranaaee bhaj man mere sabh kichh karanai jog |
lines.english: O my mind, hurry to the Sanctuary of the Lord; He is Potent to do everything.
Bibhaas, Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Mother, father, siblings, children and spouse
The mind is entangled in sweet emotional attachment.
involved with them, people eat the food of bliss.
My One Lord is the Inner-Knower, the Searcher of hearts.
Those who seek God's Glorious Virtues are the support of my breath of life. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰ ਏਕਾ ਮੈ ਟਿਕ ਏਕਸੁ ਕੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਵਡ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhar ekaa mai ttik ekas kee sir saahaa vadd purakh suaamee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He alone is my Support; He is my only Protection. My Great Lord and Master is over and above the heads of kings. ||1||Pause||
The Guru has told me that it is false and fraudulent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਲ ਨਾਗਨਿ ਸਿਉ ਮੇਰੀ ਟੂਟਨਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: chhal naagan siau meree ttoottan hoee |
lines.english: I have broken my ties to that deceitful serpent.
My mind remains satisfied with the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||
Its face is sweet, but it tastes very bitter.
I have broken my ties with greed and emotional attachment.
The Merciful Guru has rescued me from them.
The Merciful Guru has protected and saved me. ||3||
These cheating thieves have plundered so many homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਸਿਉ ਠਾਟੁ ਨ ਬਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh siau tthaatt na baniaa |
lines.english: I have no dealings whatsoever with sexual desire and anger.
Wherever I look, I see the most horrible goblins.
I listen to the Guru's Teachings.
My Guru, the Lord of the World, has saved me from them. ||4||
The Guru has told me that these pleasures are the fires of corruption.
I have made widows of the ten sensory organs.
I have forsaken the advice of my ego.
Those who associate with them go to hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ham gur raakhe har liv laae |5|
lines.english: The Guru has saved me; I am lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||5||
The Guru has told me that this is foolish stubbornness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਨੀਘਰੁ ਘਰੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eihu neeghar ghar kahee na paae |
lines.english: This ego is homeless; it shall never find a home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਏ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ham gur raakh lee liv laae |6|
lines.english: The Guru has saved me; I am lovingly attuned to the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਇ ਨ ਖਟਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: ek grih meh due na khattaanee |
lines.english: We cannot both live together in one home.
Grasping the hem of the Guru's Robe, I have come to God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਲੋਗਨ ਸਿਉ ਹਮ ਭਏ ਬੈਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ein logan siau ham bhe bairaaee |
lines.english: I have become alienated from these people.
God smiled at me and spoke, passing judgement.
Please be fair with me, All-knowing Lord God. ||7||
He made all the demons perform service for me.
Says Nanak, the Guru has passed judgement. ||8||1||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon tthaakur ihu grihu sabh teraa |
lines.english: You are my Lord and Master; all this home belongs to You.
